# AI Automation for Recruiting

## Observation
Senior executives in traditional corporations are starting to use AI tools to 10x their output. The biggest lift comes from automating the repetitive judgment calls -- resume screening, interview scheduling, candidate tracking. Orphan fixture -- should be proposed as a cross-link target for Project Alpha.

## Source
Multiple conversations with candidates and hiring managers in Q1 2026.
